no_match.hi-IN: Abhi jo bataya usse koi yojana match nahi ho rahi. Najdeeki Jan Seva Kendra mein sab check ho sakta hai.
no_match.ta-IN: Neengal solliya thagavalil edhum porundhavilai. Arugil ulla Jan Seva Kendra-vil muzhumaiyaaga paarkkalaam.
no_match.bn-IN: Apni ja bolelen tar sathe kono yojana match hocche na. Kachhakachhi Jan Seva Kendra-te sob check hote pare.
no_match.te-IN: Meeru cheppina samachaaram to eemi paddhathi saripotledu. Daggaraloni Jan Seva Kendra lo purthi check cheyinchukovachu.
no_match.gu-IN: Tamne je batavyu te pramane koi yojana match nathi thati. Najdeekna Jan Seva Kendra maa badhu check thei shake chhe.
no_match.kn-IN: Neevu helida maahiti prade yaavude yojane hondikondilla. Hattirada Jan Seva Kendra dalli ellavoo check aagabahudu.
no_match.ml-IN: Ningal paranjathu vech oru padhathiyum cherunnilla. Adutthulla Jan Seva Kendra yil muzhuvan check cheyyaam.
no_match.mr-IN: Tumhi saangitlya pramane kahi yojana match hot nahi. Javalechya Jan Seva Kendra madhe sagla check hou shakte.
no_match.pa-IN: Tusi jo dasseya usde naal koi yojana match nahi ho rahi. Najdeeki Jan Seva Kendra vich sab check ho sakda hai.
no_match.od-IN: Apane je kahile tahare kichhi yojana match huenahin. Nikatavartii Jan Seva Kendra re sabu check hoipaariba.
no_match.en-IN: Based on what you shared, no scheme matched right now. Your nearest Jan Seva Kendra can do a full check.

no_match_sms.hi-IN: Vaidya: Koi yojana match nahi hui. Jan Seva Kendra jaayein.
no_match_sms.ta-IN: Vaidya: Edhum thittam porundhavilai. Jan Seva Kendra sellavum.
no_match_sms.bn-IN: Vaidya: Kono yojana match hoyni. Jan Seva Kendra-te jaan.
no_match_sms.te-IN: Vaidya: Eemi paddhathi match kaaledu. Jan Seva Kendra ki vellanda.
no_match_sms.gu-IN: Vaidya: Koi yojana match nahi thai. Jan Seva Kendra jaav.
no_match_sms.kn-IN: Vaidya: Yaav yojane match aagilla. Jan Seva Kendra ge hogi.
no_match_sms.ml-IN: Vaidya: Oru padhathiyum match aayilla. Jan Seva Kendra yil poi.
no_match_sms.mr-IN: Vaidya: Kahi yojana match nahi. Jan Seva Kendra la jaa.
no_match_sms.pa-IN: Vaidya: Koi yojana match nahi hoyi. Jan Seva Kendra jaao.
no_match_sms.od-IN: Vaidya: Kichhi yojana match hela nahin. Jan Seva Kendra ku jaantu.
no_match_sms.en-IN: Vaidya: No scheme matched. Visit Jan Seva Kendra.

fallback_headline.hi-IN: Achi khabar hai. Aapko {scheme_name} mil sakti hai.
fallback_headline.gu-IN: Saaraa samaachaar. Tamaane {scheme_name} mali shake chhe.
fallback_headline.pa-IN: Changee khabar. Tuhaanu {scheme_name} mil sakdi hai.
fallback_headline.en-IN: Good news. You may be eligible for {scheme_name}.

results_intro.hi-IN: Achi khabar hai. Aapko {count} yojanaayein mil sakti hain. Sun lijiye.
results_intro.ta-IN: Nalla seidhi. Ungalukku {count} thittangal kidaikkalaam. Kettukkollunga.
results_intro.bn-IN: Bhalo khobar. Apni {count} ti yojana pete paren. Shune nin.
results_intro.te-IN: Manchhi vaartha. Meeku {count} paddhathulu dorakavachu. Vinandi.
results_intro.gu-IN: Saaraa samaachaar. Tamaane {count} yojana mali shake chhe. Saambhalo.
results_intro.kn-IN: Olle sudi. Nimge {count} yojanegalu sigabahudu. Keli.
results_intro.ml-IN: Nalla vaarttha. Ningalkku {count} padhathikal labhikkam. Kelkkoo.
results_intro.mr-IN: Changali baatmi. Tumhala {count} yojana miluu shaktaat. Aika.
results_intro.pa-IN: Changee khabar. Tuhaanu {count} yojanavaan mil sakdiyan ne. Sun lao.
results_intro.od-IN: Bhala khabara. Apanankari {count} yojana mili paaribe. Shunantu.
results_intro.en-IN: Good news. You may be eligible for {count} schemes. Here they are.

results_offer_detail.hi-IN: Kisi ek yojana ke baare mein zyada jaanna ho to naam batayein. Main poori list SMS bhi bhej sakta hoon.
results_offer_detail.ta-IN: Edhaavadhu oru thittam patri adhigam therinjukolla, per sollunga. Muzhu list-ai SMS-il anuppalaam.
results_offer_detail.bn-IN: Kono ekti yojana niye aaro jante chaile naam bolun. Puro list SMS-eo pathate pari.
results_offer_detail.te-IN: Edaina oka paddhathi gurinchi ekkuva telusukovaalante peru cheppandi. Mottam list SMS lo kooda pampagalanu.
results_offer_detail.gu-IN: Koi ek yojana vishe vadhu jaanvu hoy to naam kaho. Aakhi list SMS maa pan mokli shaku.
results_offer_detail.kn-IN: Yaavude ondu yojane bagge heccu tiliyabekaadre hesaru heli. Poorti list annu SMS nalloo kaluhisabahudu.
results_offer_detail.ml-IN: Etenkilum oru padhathiye kurichu kooduthal ariyaanenkil per parayoo. Muzhuvan list SMS aayum ayakkam.
results_offer_detail.mr-IN: Konteahi ek yojana baddal adhik jaanun ghyaayche asel tar naav saanga. Puri yaadi SMS nehi pathavu shakto.
results_offer_detail.pa-IN: Kise ik yojana baare hor jaanna hove taan naam dasso. Puri list SMS vich vi bhej sakda haan.
results_offer_detail.od-IN: Kounasi gotie yojana bishayare adhika jaanibaku chahile naam kahantu. Sampurna list SMS re madhya paathai paaribi.
results_offer_detail.en-IN: To hear more about any one scheme, just say its name. I can also send the full list by SMS.

fallback_action.ml-IN: Ningalude adutthulla Jan Seva Kendra yil pokuka.
fallback_action.mr-IN: Tumchya javalechya Jan Seva Kendra la jaa.
fallback_action.pa-IN: Tuhaade najdeeki Jan Seva Kendra vich jaao.

fallback_action.en-IN: Visit your nearest Jan Seva Kendra.
